name: telegram_safe_pdf_scraper
description: Safely scrapes Telegram channels for internal PDF files, ignores malicious external links, and categorizes them into local folders based on chat headers. Uses native browser automation.
author: OpenClaw Dev

channel_name.description: The exact name of the Telegram channel to search for.

download_directory.description: Base directory on your PC to save the files (e.g., C:/StudyMaterials).

scroll_limit.description: Number of message batches to scroll up and scan. Prevents infinite scrolling.
